title: The Other Side of the Green IT Balance Sheet
description: A visual representation of the often-overlooked negative environmental impacts of IT operations, contrasting them with the positive sustainability goals.
elements: IT Operations & Infrastructure (Data Centers, Networks, Devices)
Direct Negative Impacts (E-Waste, Energy Consumption, Water Usage)
Indirect Negative Impacts (Rebound Effect, Planned Obsolescence, Supply Chain Footprint)
Sustainability Goals (Carbon Neutrality, Zero Waste, Circular Economy)
relationships: IT Operations generate Direct and Indirect Negative Impacts which create a liability that must be actively managed and offset to achieve the organization's stated Sustainability Goals, forming the 'other side' of the balance sheet.
